description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn, surrounded by a cluster of trees and landscaping elements. The house features a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes, with a prominent dark gable roof covering the main structure. A large glass window and sliding doors open onto a wooden deck, which leads to a rectangular swimming pool and a paved patio area. The property includes a circular hot tub, a driveway with a curved path, and a detached cylindrical structure that may serve as a utility or storage shed. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with trees providing privacy and visual interest around the perimeter of the house.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, a deck, pool, hot tub, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck, pool, hot tub, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, cylindrical shed, and the house's wood and concrete facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, pool, patio, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the house's gable roof, deck, pool, and the curved driveway with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and direct access to a wooden deck; minimal decorative elements.
